metadata.title: El Travieso Vermouth
metadata.description: Refined brutalism for premium vermouth with a rogue spirit.

descriptions.recipes: Over a thousand cocktails with editorial cards and A–Z search.
descriptions.spirits: Encyclopedia of spirits, brands and families.
descriptions.library: Reference books for bar and cocktail culture.
descriptions.shop: Vermouth, ingredients, glassware and El Travieso merch.
descriptions.aiBar: Create new recipes with AI and publish instantly.
descriptions.map: Featured venues, reservations and world guide.
descriptions.screen: Curated series, podcasts and live streams.
descriptions.barOnline: Chat rooms and tastings for professionals.

techGenerator.title: AI Bar
techGenerator.subtitle: Search the recipe book, write your brief and create new recipes with AI.
techGenerator.agentUnavailable: The AI agent is unavailable. Check API keys in .env.local (see .env.example).
techGenerator.notConfiguredBody: Add GEMINI_API_KEY or GROQ_API_KEY in .env.local, or set AI_MOCK=true for local demo.
techGenerator.promptLabel: Describe your idea, comments or adaptation
techGenerator.promptPlaceholder: E.g. A citrusy refreshing cocktail with red vermouth for the terrace, inspired by a daiquiri…
techGenerator.publishHint: Published on /recetas with ingredients, method and glass type.
techGenerator.noIngredients: Could not extract ingredients. Try again with more detail.

footer.tagline: Premium rogue vermouth. Recipes, venues and bar culture in one portal.

shop.title: Shop
shop.metaDescription: Buy the roguest vermouth online. Bottles, packs, official merch and our liquid encyclopedia.
shop.heroLead: Tasting packs, single bottles, syrups, sodas, bar gear and our liquid encyclopedia.
shop.empty: No products in this category right now.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Join the El Travieso community
register.marketingOptIn: I want to receive news and offers by email.
register.marketingSmsOptIn: I want SMS or WhatsApp updates (requires a phone number on my profile).
register.termsRequired: You must accept the terms and privacy policy.
register.success: Account created. Sign in with your email and password.

setup2fa.title: Set up 2FA
setup2fa.adminRequired: Required for administrators: protects orders, sales and customer data.
setup2fa.subtitle: Strengthen your account security with Google Authenticator.
setup2fa.alreadyEnabled: 2FA is already enabled on your account.
setup2fa.scanQr: 1. Scan the QR code with Google Authenticator.
setup2fa.enabledSuccess: 2FA enabled! Sign in again with your authentication code.
setup2fa.backupCodes: Save these backup codes in a safe place

checkoutForm.title: Order confirmation
checkoutForm.emptyHint: Add products from the shop before checkout.
checkoutForm.acceptTerms: I accept the terms and conditions
checkoutForm.reviewHint: Review your cart and complete your details before secure Stripe checkout.
checkoutForm.validationError: You must provide your email and accept the terms and privacy policy.

recipeDetail.premiumBody: This recipe includes rare spirits and advanced techniques. Join the VIP Club to unlock it.

map.title: Venue guide
map.lead: Explore the 3D globe with cocktail bars and restaurants from the El Travieso network, plus World's 50 Best global and regional highlights. Toggle layers and filter by continent.
map.emptyNoCoordinates: No venues with coordinates on the map yet.
map.emptySeedHint: Import highlights with <command>npm run seed:venues</command> or enable "Show on map" in My venue.
map.emptyActivateLayer: Enable at least one map layer.

ageGate.title: Are you of legal drinking age?
ageGate.description: You must be of legal age to consume alcohol in your country.
ageGate.confirm: Yes, I am of legal age
ageGate.blockedBody: You must be of legal drinking age to visit this site.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.description: We use essential cookies and, with your consent, analytics and preference cookies (language and interface settings).
cookies.prefHint: Saves your language and interface settings
cookies.analyticsHint: Helps us improve by understanding how you use the site

errors.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please try again later.
errors.weakPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.invalidEmail: You must provide a valid email
errors.paymentsDisabled: Payments are disabled in this demo environment
errors.marketplaceLoginRequired: Sign in to buy marketplace products

legalNotice.title: Legal notice
legalNotice.metaDescription: Legal notice for El Travieso Vermouth.

emails.footer: El Travieso Vermouth — premium vermouth with a rogue spirit.
